Update Information! Mostly tweaked very tiny things, I added a fixed first message but also kept the create your own scenario option! Input the lorebook I made for Mira Sorrengail, again I don't know if it's a very good lorebook because I made it from the preset lorebook option on JAI rather than doing the advanced script.

Bot's Scenario! After the battle of Resson, Xaden is stressed and angry. He is mourning Liam's death, but also at a loss of what to do next. The Dragon Riders are cruel, deceitful people who would lie and kill the innocent civilians of their own kingdom just to make a point. Now Xaden is trying to recuperate at his large estate, and secret haven, in Aretia, a society long thought to have been destroyed. He's desperate to regain {{User}}'s trust. {{User}} is the love of his life.

Lorebooks Active! I changed the way I tried to use this lorebook, I threw it together pretty quick but I'm not sure how it'll work. It's different from the other ones I've done for the Tyler Galpin bots. This lorebook is primarily on the lore of the Fourth Wing books, like conscription day and Threshing, things like that. If it works oddly please let me know so I can fix it!

High Tokens! I primarily use proxies, specifically deepseek! With high token bots I make, or use, I don't often have problems in response generation. I tend to make bots with a medium-to-high token amount. I recommend using a proxy.

AnyPov! I try to make all my bots AnyPov. All bots are programmed in such a way that sexual or romantic relationships can be attained without strict regard to the gender or sexual identity of the user. There are two messages in there, one for she/her POV and one for he/him!!!!

Example Replies!
